issues.description: levelAwareRetrieve line 562-564: variable self-reference. cragChunks initializer references itself in the false branch (: cragChunks), which yields null when CRAG verdict is not LOW_CONFIDENCE. Line 566 !cragChunks.isEmpty() will throw NPE.
levelAwareRetrieve line 538: buildGraphRelationMap(candidates, 2) return value discarded. mmrSelector.select on line 543 passes null as graphRelatedDocIds, disabling graph-aware MMR entirely.
issues.fix: Capture return value: Map<Long, Map<Long, Integer>> graphRelated = buildGraphRelationMap(candidates, 2); then pass graphRelated to mmrSelector.select call on line 543

issues.description: CRAG retry callback in levelAwareRetrieve line 554 uses embed(userId, question) instead of the hydeQuery variable, causing inconsistent semantic spaces between main retrieval and corrective retry.
issues.fix: Replace question with hydeQuery in the retry callback closure

issues.description: Constructor parameter modelName (@Value app.rag.cross-encoder.model) is injected but never stored or used. Dead configuration.
issues.fix: Remove unused modelName parameter and @Value annotation

issues.description: LlmStreamingService emits corrected event (for hallucination-checked answers) but ChatView has no event listener for 'corrected'. Users never see the corrected version.
issues.fix: Add: es.addEventListener('corrected', (e) => { const last = messages.value[messages.value.length-1]; if (last?.role==='assistant') last.content = e.data; })

issues.description: ThreadLocal leak: invoked and rounds fields use beginSession/endSession pattern but exceptions in tool handlers can skip endSession, accumulating ThreadLocal entries across async requests.
issues.fix: Use try-finally to ensure endSession runs; or clean up in request-scoped interceptor

issues.description: traceCitations deepModel call shares default chat-timeout (60s) which may be insufficient for large source documents. Source truncation at 10000 chars ignores actual token budget.
issues.fix: Configure a dedicated longer timeout for deepModel; truncate by token count instead of char count

issues.description: Test coverage gap: no test covers the cragChunks NPE path in levelAwareRetrieve, and no integration test for the full methodLevelRetrieve pipeline.
issues.fix: Add unit tests for levelAwareRetrieve with CRAG non-LOW_CONFIDENCE path; add integration test for methodLevelRetrieve

issues.description: filterNoise discards low-score chunks with max*0.3 threshold but does not log the count of filtered results, making quality degradation invisible in monitoring.
issues.fix: Log filtered chunk count in filterNoise or expose via MeterRegistry gauge

issues.description: SemanticCacheService code default threshold is 0.92 but application.yml sets 0.95. Code comment says 'threshold 0.92 conservative' which is inaccurate for deployed config.
issues.fix: Align either the code default or the yml value; update the comment to match the actual threshold in use

issues.description: currentProjectDir is a plain String field written by setCurrentProjectDir without synchronization. Concurrent switchMode calls may race.
issues.fix: Replace with AtomicReference<String> or add synchronized keyword

issues.description: LLM call in classify() uses default timeout; if the model hangs the thread blocks indefinitely. Should have a configurable timeout.
issues.fix: Implement CompletableFuture with timeout or ensure chat-timeout-seconds applies to this call path
